Roadmap.title: A clear sequence beats a crowded dashboard.
Roadmap.description: The product can grow in measured layers. Each phase adds structure without diluting the brand or the interface.

audit.title: Map the essentials
audit.description: Define the core pages, token system, copy blocks, and message structure before adding moving parts.

design.title: Set the design language
design.description: Lock typography, color behavior, spacing rules, and component patterns so future sections inherit the same standard.

automation.title: Add useful tools
automation.description: Introduce calculators, newsletter flows, and AI-assisted features only when the content and navigation framework are stable.

review.title: Refine the system
review.description: Tighten the details, simplify what drifts, and keep the brand clear as the platform expands.
